THE PAYMENTS ARE TO BE PAID FORM MR. QUEHLS HALF INTEREST OF THE SALE PROCEEDS. THE SALE PROCEED WIL BE PLACED INTO A BLOCKED ACCOUNT WITH INTEREST BEARING. THE PARTIES ARE TO FILE THEIR POSITION ON HOW THE FUNDS SHOULD BE DIVIDED IN 60 DAYS. REPLY TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY 03/28/05. REPORT OF STATUS BY 05/09/05. MR.
